title: Sami (disambiguation)
content:
'''Sami''' could refer to:
==Canon==
* '''[[Sami (Pantoran)|Sami]]''', a [[Pantoran]] subject of [[Project Necromancer]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Sami (Human)|Sami]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] scientist during the [[Jedi Civil War]]
*'''[[Sami (Cantrosian)|Sami]]''', a [[Cantrosian]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]]
{{Disambig}}
